summary: Enhanced Simulation Comparison UI testing complete. All 14 features tested and PASS. New extended config fields (recovery_minutes, recovery_buffer, min_clear_cycles, instability_cooldown_minutes), escalation tiers editor, preset buttons, stale indicator, safer Apply flow, and componentization all verified working correctly.

frontend.extended_config_fields_cfg_a: PASS - recovery_minutes, recovery_buffer, min_clear_cycles, instability_cooldown_minutes all render with correct default values (15, 5, 2, 30)
frontend.extended_config_fields_cfg_b: PASS - Same 4 fields render in Config B with matching default values
frontend.escalation_tiers_editor_cfg_a: PASS - L1 (60-75), L2 (75-90), L3 (90-100) range inputs visible and editable
frontend.escalation_tiers_editor_cfg_b: PASS - Same tier editor with separate range inputs for Config B
frontend.preset_buttons_only_on_cfg_b: PASS - Conservative, Balanced, Aggressive buttons appear ONLY on Config B, NOT on Config A
frontend.preset_conservative: PASS - Applies threshold=70, recovery=20, cooldown=45, tiers 70-85/85-95/95-100
frontend.preset_balanced: PASS - Applies threshold=60 with default balanced settings
frontend.preset_aggressive: PASS - Applies threshold=50, cooldown=15, tiers 50-65/65-80/80-100, weights 0.6/0.4
frontend.load_production_button: PASS - Loads production config into Config A
frontend.run_comparison: PASS - Runs comparison successfully, shows results panel with delta KPIs
frontend.stale_indicator_appears: PASS - Amber banner with text 'Configuration changed since last run. Results are outdated.' appears after config change
frontend.stale_rerun_button: PASS - Re-run button in stale banner triggers new comparison and clears stale state
frontend.swap_ab_button: PASS - Swaps all config fields correctly (threshold A=60/B=50 -> A=50/B=60) and marks results stale
frontend.clear_button: PASS - Clears results panel and stale state
frontend.weight_validation_error: PASS - Shows inline error 'Weights sum to 0.8 (must equal 1.0)' when invalid
frontend.weight_validation_toast: PASS - Toast error shown when attempting to run comparison with invalid weights
frontend.apply_dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog opens with title 'Apply Config B to Production'
frontend.apply_dialog_content: PASS - Shows warning about combined_anomaly rule and that changes cannot be undone
frontend.apply_checkbox_disables_confirm: PASS - Confirm Apply button disabled until checkbox is checked
frontend.apply_checkbox_enables_confirm: PASS - Confirm Apply button enabled after checkbox checked
frontend.apply_cancel_closes_dialog: PASS - Cancel button closes dialog correctly
frontend.apply_button_enabled_condition: PASS - Apply button enabled after successful comparison where B differs from A

componentization_verified: SimulationCompareTab.jsx - Main compare tab logic, stale indicator, validation, apply flow
CompareConfigCard.jsx - Config card with extended fields, tiers editor, presets
CompareResultsPanel.jsx - Results display (delta KPIs, tier chart, device changes)
CompareApplyDialog.jsx - Confirmation dialog with checkbox guard
critical_code_review_comments: Extended config fields properly integrated in both Config A and B cards
Escalation tiers editor allows inline editing of L1/L2/L3 ranges
Preset buttons correctly populate all fields including new recovery/cooldown fields and tier ranges
Stale indicator correctly tracks config changes after successful comparison runs
Apply Config B flow properly disabled when stale, enabled only after valid comparison where B differs
Confirm dialog has proper safety guard with checkbox requirement
Componentization properly separates concerns across 4 components
Weight validation working both inline and via toast on run attempt
seed_data_creation: None needed - used production config and live telemetry comparison
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Simulation Comparison UI fully tested. All 7 enhancements working: 1) Extended config fields (recovery_minutes, recovery_buffer, min_clear_cycles, instability_cooldown_minutes) in both configs, 2) Escalation tiers editor (L1/L2/L3 range inputs), 3) Preset buttons (Conservative/Balanced/Aggressive) on Config B only, 4) Weight validation (sum=1.0), 5) Stale indicator with Re-run button, 6) Safer Apply flow (disabled when stale/A=B), 7) Componentization (CompareConfigCard, CompareResultsPanel, CompareApplyDialog). Navigate to /operator/simulation and click Compare tab to test.
screenshots: .screenshots/compare_tab_full.jpg - Full Compare tab with both config cards and new fields
.screenshots/preset_conservative.jpg - Config B with Conservative preset applied
.screenshots/preset_aggressive.jpg - Config B with Aggressive preset applied
